milestone_targets.title: M293 Performance benchmark architecture, telemetry, and comparative baselines
required_description_snippets: Corrective dependencies consumed:
- `M313`: use the shared acceptance-suite and validation-collapse outputs instead of growing a fresh milestone-local checker/readiness stack.
- `M314`: route operator-facing benchmark workflows through the compact command and workflow surface rather than recreating public script sprawl.
- `M315`: benchmark evidence, telemetry artifacts, and comparison outputs must use stable identifiers and satisfy provenance/regeneration rules.
- `M318`: any additive validation, script, or artifact surface must stay inside the anti-noise budgets and exception path.
required_issue_body_snippets: ## Post-cleanup dependency rewrite
- After cleanup completion, consume `M313` shared acceptance-suite surfaces instead of creating fresh milestone-local checker/readiness stacks by default.
- Route operator-facing entrypoints through the compact workflow and command surface from `M314`; do not recreate public npm-script sprawl here.
- Benchmark evidence, replay data, and committed samples in this milestone must satisfy the stable-identifier, provenance, and regeneration rules from `M315`.
- Stay inside the anti-noise budgets and exception process from `M318`; additive validation/script/artifact surfaces need the explicit exception path.

- Runtime-sensitive performance claims in this milestone must wait for the corrected runtime floor from `M316`; do not benchmark pre-corrective dispatch/accessor/native-output behavior as product truth.

milestone_targets.title: M297 Release artifacts, provenance, and reproducibility
required_description_snippets: Corrective dependencies consumed:
- `M313`: reuse the consolidated acceptance-suite surfaces for release smoke, install verification, and distribution closeout instead of rebuilding milestone-local validation stacks.
- `M314`: distribution operators and release commands must route through the compact command-surface and workflow model.
- `M315`: shipped payloads, provenance records, and replay artifacts must obey the stable-identifier and authenticity/regeneration policy.
- `M318`: distribution growth must stay inside the anti-noise budgets and use the explicit exception path for any additive scripts or validation surfaces.
required_issue_body_snippets: ## Post-cleanup dependency rewrite
- After cleanup completion, build release/install verification on the consolidated acceptance-suite surfaces from `M313` instead of recreating milestone-local checker ecosystems.
- Route release and packaging operators through the compact workflow and command model from `M314`; do not reintroduce public command sprawl here.
- Distribution payloads, install smoke outputs, and release proofs in this milestone must satisfy the stable-identifier, provenance, and regeneration rules from `M315`.
- Stay inside the anti-noise budgets and exception process from `M318`; additive scripts, smoke flows, and evidence surfaces need the explicit exception path.
- Where packaged payloads depend on runtime object-model behavior, treat the corrected runtime floor from `M316` as authoritative rather than packaging pre-corrective behavior.

milestone_targets.title: M305 Standard library architecture and canonical module boundaries
required_description_snippets: Corrective dependencies consumed:
- `M313`: stdlib work must use the shared acceptance-suite and validation-collapse outputs rather than creating a new milestone-local validation ecosystem.
- `M314`: stdlib build, bootstrap, and operator-facing workflows must use the compact command surface and simplified workflow model.
- `M315`: module names, package identifiers, generated docs/examples, and emitted artifacts must follow the stable-identifier and provenance/regeneration policy.
- `M316`: stdlib APIs, helpers, and examples must treat the corrected dispatch/accessor/native-output runtime floor as authoritative.
- `M318`: stdlib growth must stay inside the anti-noise budgets and exception path instead of recreating sprawling helper script and artifact families.
required_issue_body_snippets: ## Post-cleanup dependency rewrite

- Module names, package identifiers, generated docs/examples, and emitted artifacts in this milestone must satisfy the stable-identifier, provenance, and regeneration rules from `M315`.
- Treat the corrected runtime floor from `M316` as authoritative for stdlib APIs, helper layers, and examples; do not bake pre-corrective dispatch/accessor/native-output behavior into public modules.
